record.field: Elementary School A - Grade 1 Admission Fee (demo)

field.name: line_ids
field.eval: [ (0, 0, { 'sequence': 5, 'name': 'Registration Fee', 'product_id': ref('ssi_school_admission.demo_product_admission_1'), 'uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'uom_quantity': 1.0, 'price_unit': 500000.0, 'account_id': ref('ssi_school_admission.demo_account_income'), }), (0, 0, { 'sequence': 10, 'name': 'Books and Uniform Fee', 'product_id': ref('ssi_school_admission.demo_product_admission_2'), 'uom_id': ref('uom.product_uom_unit'), 'uom_quantity': 1.0, 'price_unit': 1500000.0, 'account_id': ref('ssi_school_admission.demo_account_income'), }), ]
